name: White Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the mushrooms and cook until golden brown.
2. Stir in the white wine, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper. Cook for 10 minutes on medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the heavy cream. Serve hot over the cooked pasta with grated cheese on the side.
